summary: Plan-only assessment for five independent open PRs. No merge recommendation is safe because none has complete merge preflight with Codex /review. One PR has a concrete repair path for a failed proof check; the remaining PRs need maintainer decisions or author-followup resolution before finalization.

actions.reason: Compatibility-affecting provider behavior needs maintainer acceptance and required merge preflight before any merge recommendation.
Active author-followup state blocks automated finalization; maintainer should resolve the waiting-on-author thread before merge or repair planning.
Active author-followup plus unrelated test-file churn requires maintainer/author resolution before automated merge or repair.
A narrow repair of the contributor branch is concrete: address the failing proof/check path, rerun targeted Inworld validation, run Codex /review, and preserve @cshape credit.
External hardware/platform documentation is a product-scope decision; automated closure is blocked and merge requires maintainer acceptance plus merge preflight.

needs_human: #79702: maintainer acceptance required for compatibility-affecting embedding-prefix behavior and missing merge preflight.
#88301: waiting-on-author state must be resolved before finalization.
#87481: waiting-on-author state and unrelated test churn must be resolved before finalization.
#87627: maintainer product-scope decision required for external hardware documentation.
